question: s6-q010

evidence.A: result[0].data.evs = 1.000000; equals the true <ZZ> = 1.0 -> holds the expectation value (match=True)
evidence.B: result[0].data.stds = 0.000000 is the standard error of the estimate, NOT the expectation value (1.0)
evidence.C: result[0].data.meas raises AttributeError: an Estimator DataBin has no bitstring counts (that is Sampler output)
evidence.D: result[0].data.quasi_dists raises AttributeError: quasi_dists was a retired V1 Sampler field, never on EstimatorV2
